permissions.label: Commercial use
permissions.description: The licensed work may be used for commercial purposes.

permissions.label: Modification
permissions.description: The licensed work may be modified.

permissions.label: Distribution
permissions.description: The licensed work may be distributed.

permissions.label: Private use
permissions.description: The licensed work may be used and modified in private.

permissions.label: Patent use
permissions.description: An express grant of patent rights from contributors.

conditions.label: Include copyright
conditions.description: A copy of the license and copyright notice must be included with the work.

conditions.label: Document changes
conditions.description: Changes made to the licensed work must be documented.

conditions.label: Disclose source
conditions.description: Source code must be made available when the work is distributed.

conditions.label: Network use disclosure
conditions.description: Users who interact with the work over a network must be able to receive the source.

conditions.label: Same license
conditions.description: Modifications must be released under the same license.

limitations.label: Liability
limitations.description: The license includes a limitation of liability.

limitations.label: Warranty
limitations.description: The license explicitly states it does not provide a warranty.

limitations.label: Trademark use
limitations.description: The license does not grant trademark rights.
